ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "biomass" REAL /* Energy production from biomass */,
  "coal" REAL /* Energy production from coal */,
  "gas" REAL /* Energy production from gas */,
  "hydro" REAL /* Energy production from hydro */,
  "imports" REAL /* Energy imports */,
  "nuclear" REAL /* Energy production from nuclear */,
  "other" REAL /* Energy production from other sources */,
  "solar" REAL /* Energy production from solar */,
  "wind" REAL /* Energy production from wind */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy producer */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the data is collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES energy_producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., biomass, coal, gas, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the energy source (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  "source_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the energy source */,
  "source_capacity" REAL /* Production capacity of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy producer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the energy producer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the energy producer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the producer is located */,
  "producer_type" TEXT /* Type of the producer (e.g., power plant, transmission grid, distribution network) */,
  "producer_status" TEXT /* Current status of the producer (e.g., operational, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., every 30 minutes, hourly) */,
  "collection_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the collection method */,
  "collection_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy target */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the target is set */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value (e.g., total energy production, percentage of renewable energy) */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., total production, renewable percentage) */,
  "target_status" TEXT /* Progress of the target (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy analyst, regulator, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)
